'''masuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacationwear|vacationwear]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacationwear|vacationwear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| masuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæsichith|mæsichith]] || [[word:mæsichij|mæsichij]] || [[word:mæsichish|mæsichish]] || [[word:mæsichi|mæsichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:masusuchuth|masusuchuth]] || [[word:masusuchuj|masusuchuj]] || [[word:masusuchush|masusuchush]] || [[word:masusuchu|masusuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:masuchuth|masuchuth]] || [[word:masuchuj|masuchuj]] || [[word:masuchush|masuchush]] || [[word:masuchu|masuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:masufchuth|masufchuth]] || [[word:masufchuj|masufchuj]] || [[word:masufchush|masufchush]] || [[word:masufchuf|masufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:masuchuthu|masuchuthu]] || [[word:masuchuju|masuchuju]] || [[word:masuchushu|masuchushu]] || [[word:masuchuku|masuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:masuchuth|masuchuth]] || [[word:masuchuj|masuchuj]] || [[word:masuchush|masuchush]] || [[word:masuchu|masuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:masuchuthul|masuchuthul]] || [[word:masuchujul|masuchujul]] || [[word:masuchushul|masuchushul]] || [[word:masuchukul|masuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:masuchuthuthu|masuchuthuthu]] || [[word:masuchujuju|masuchujuju]] || [[word:masuchushushu|masuchushushu]] || [[word:masuchuku|masuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:masuchuthun|masuchuthun]] || [[word:masuchujun|masuchujun]] || [[word:masuchushun|masuchushun]] || [[word:masuchukun|masuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:masuchuthuoro|masuchuthuoro]] || [[word:masuchujuoro|masuchujuoro]] || [[word:masuchushuoro|masuchushuoro]] || [[word:masuchukuoro|masuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
